scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client --omit=none && npm install --prefix server && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('../_sync_mcp')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm install --prefix ../_sync_mcp', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:sync"
